pages.title: Current Indicators
pages.text: $(bold)Block texture$() (future feature): $(li)Different texture per state (visual feedback)$(br2)$(bold)GUI indicators$(): $(li)Open PreFab GUI → Shows current state

pages.title: Debug Information
pages.text: $(bold)Press F3$() (debug screen): $(li)Look at PreFab block $(li)Hover text shows state (future feature)$(br2)$(bold)Chat messages$() (current): $(li)Some transitions show chat messages (e.g., "Entering SIMULATING state")$(br2)---
